title: HFM Kenya Review 2026: Best MT5 Broker for Kenyan Traders
excerpt: Complete HFM (HF Markets) review for Kenyan traders. Spreads, M-Pesa deposits, MT5 platform, and how to connect with PesaPips automation.
content:
## Why HFM is Our Top Pick for Kenyan Traders

After testing 12 brokers available in Kenya, HF Markets (HFM) consistently ranks as the best choice for both beginners and experienced traders.

## Regulation and Safety

HFM is regulated by:
- **FSCA** (South Africa) - Primary regulation for Kenya
- **CySEC** (Cyprus)
- **DFSA** (Dubai)
- **FSA** (Seychelles)

**Safety Rating**: ★★★★★ (5/5)

## Account Types

### Micro Account:
- **Minimum deposit**: $5
- **Spreads**: From 1.0 pips
- **Commission**: None
- **Best for**: Beginners, small accounts

### Premium Account:
- **Minimum deposit**: $250
- **Spreads**: From 0.1 pips
- **Commission**: None
- **Best for**: Serious traders

### Zero Spread Account:
- **Minimum deposit**: $250
- **Spreads**: 0.0 pips
- **Commission**: $3 per lot
- **Best for**: Scalpers, EA traders

## Spreads Comparison

| Instrument | Micro | Premium | Zero Spread |
|------------|-------|---------|-------------|
| EURUSD | 1.2 pips | 0.8 pips | 0.0 + $3 |
| GBPUSD | 1.4 pips | 1.0 pips | 0.0 + $3 |
| XAUUSD (Gold) | 0.35 | 0.25 | 0.2 + $3 |
| USD/KES | Fixed | Fixed | Fixed |

## Deposit and Withdrawal Methods

### M-Pesa (Key Feature for Kenyans):
- **Deposit**: Instant
- **Withdrawal**: 1-2 hours
- **Fees**: None
- **Min**: KSh 1,000

### Other Methods:
- **Bank Transfer**: 1-3 days

- **USDT**: Instant

## MT5 Platform Experience

HFM offers full MT5 support:
- **Desktop**: Windows, Mac
- **Mobile**: iOS, Android
- **Web**: Browser-based
- **Features**: All indicators, EAs, backtesting

## PesaPips Integration

HFM works seamlessly with PesaPips:
- ✓ Easy MT5 connection
- ✓ Low latency execution

- ✓ Reliable uptime

**[Connect HFM to PesaPips →](https://pesapips.ai/register)**

## Customer Support

- **Kenya phone**: +254 20 764 0900
- **Live chat**: 24/5
- **Email**: support@hfm.com
- **Local office**: Nairobi (Westlands)

**Support Rating**: ★★★★★ (5/5)

## Pros and Cons

✓ M-Pesa deposits and withdrawals
✓ Local support in Nairobi

✓ Tight spreads on Premium account

✓ 24/5 customer service

### Cons:
✗ Higher spreads on Micro account
✗ No MT4 (MT5 only)
✗ Weekend withdrawals delayed

## Trading Conditions

- **Leverage**: Up to 1:1000 (1:200 for Kenya residents)

- **Stop out level**: 50%
- **Margin call**: 100%

## Bonuses and Promotions

- **Welcome bonus**: 100% deposit bonus up to $1,000

- **Loyalty program**: HFM Rewards

## Real User Reviews

> "I've been with HFM for 2 years. M-Pesa deposits are instant and withdrawals take 1-2 hours. Spreads are competitive on Premium account. Perfect for Kenyan traders." - James M., Nairobi

> "Using HFM with PesaPips automation. The connection is stable, execution is fast, and customer support responds quickly. Highly recommended." - Sarah W., Mombasa

2. Click "Open Account"
3. Choose account type (recommend Premium)
4. Complete verification (ID and proof of address)
5. Deposit via M-Pesa
6. Download MT5
7. Connect to PesaPips

**[Open HFM account with M-Pesa →](https://register.hfm.com/ke/en/new-live-account/?refid=30359412)**

title: Exness Kenya Review: Is It Safe for Kenyan Forex Traders?

content:
## Exness Overview

Exness is one of the most popular brokers in Kenya, known for low minimum deposits and instant withdrawals. But is it safe for Kenyan traders?

## Regulation and Safety

Exness is regulated by:
- **FSA** (Seychelles) - Primary for Kenya
- **FCA** (UK) - UK clients only
- **CySEC** (Cyprus) - European clients
- **FSCA** (South Africa)

**Safety Rating**: ★★★★☆ (4/5)

## Account Types

### Standard Account:
- **Minimum deposit**: $1
- **Spreads**: From 0.3 pips
- **Commission**: None
- **Best for**: Beginners

### Raw Spread Account:
- **Minimum deposit**: $200
- **Spreads**: From 0.0 pips
- **Commission**: $3.50 per lot
- **Best for**: Scalpers, EAs

### Zero Account:
- **Minimum deposit**: $200
- **Spreads**: From 0.0 pips
- **Commission**: None
- **Best for**: News traders

## Spreads Comparison

| Instrument | Standard | Raw Spread |
|------------|----------|------------|
| EURUSD | 0.7 pips | 0.0 + $3.50 |
| GBPUSD | 0.9 pips | 0.0 + $3.50 |
| XAUUSD | 0.25 | 0.20 |
| USD/KES | Fixed | Fixed |

## Deposits and Withdrawals

### M-Pesa:
- **Deposit**: Instant
- **Withdrawal**: Instant (24/7)
- **Fees**: None
- **Min**: KSh 100

### Other Methods:
- **Bank Transfer**: 1-2 days
- **Card**: Instant
- **USDT**: Instant
- **Airtel Money**: Yes

**Withdrawal Rating**: ★★★★★ (5/5) - Instant withdrawals

## MT5 Platform

Exness offers full MT5 support:
- ✓ All Exness accounts support MT5
- ✓ No restrictions on EAs
- ✓ Good execution speed
- ✓ Mobile, desktop, web

## PesaPips Compatibility

Exness works with PesaPips:
- ✓ Easy MT5 connection
- ✓ Good execution
- ✓ Some restrictions on certain account types

**[Connect Exness to PesaPips →](https://pesapips.ai/register)**

## Customer Support

- **Live chat**: 24/7
- **Email**: support@exness.com
- **Phone**: Global number
- **No Kenya office**: Support from overseas

**Support Rating**: ★★★★☆ (4/5)

## Pros and Cons

### Pros:
✓ Instant M-Pesa withdrawals (24/7)
✓ $1 minimum deposit
✓ Very low spreads on Raw account
✓ 24/7 customer support
✓ Unlimited leverage (for some accounts)
✓ Islamic accounts available

### Cons:
✗ No local office in Kenya
✗ FSA regulation only (not top-tier for Kenya)
✗ Spreads widen during news
✗ Limited account types for MT5

## Unlimited Leverage Feature

Exness offers unlimited leverage on some accounts:
- **Standard account**: Unlimited leverage
- **Risk**: Extremely high risk
- **Recommendation**: Use with strict risk management

## Real User Reviews

> "Exness withdrawals are instant - money in M-Pesa within seconds. That's the best feature. But spreads widen during news, so I use HFM for news trading." - David K., Nairobi

> "I use Exness with PesaPips. Connection is stable and execution is good. The instant withdrawals are a game-changer." - Mary W., Kisumu

## How to Open an Exness Account

1. Visit Exness website
2. Click "Open Account"
3. Choose Standard or Raw Spread
4. Complete verification
5. Deposit via M-Pesa
6. Download MT5
7. Connect to PesaPips

**[Open Exness account →](https://exness.com)**

## Comparison with HFM

| Feature | Exness | HFM |
|---------|--------|-----|
| M-Pesa | ✓ Instant | ✓ 1-2 hours |
| Min Deposit | $1 | $5 |
| Withdrawal Speed | Instant | 1-2 hours |
| Local Office | ✗ | ✓ Nairobi |
| Regulation | FSA | FSCA |
| Support | 24/7 global | Kenya hours |
| EURUSD Spread | 0.7 pips | 0.8 pips |

## Expert Verdict

**Best for**: Traders who prioritize instant withdrawals and low minimum deposits.

**Not best for**: Traders who want local support and top-tier regulation.

**Overall Rating**: ★★★★☆ (4.2/5)

## Should You Choose Exness?

Choose Exness if:
- You want instant M-Pesa withdrawals
- You have a small account ($1-$100)

Choose HFM if:

## ICMarkets Overview

## Regulation and Safety

ICMarkets is regulated by:
- **FSCA** (South Africa) - Primary for Kenya
- **ASIC** (Australia)
- **CySEC** (Cyprus)
- **FSA** (Seychelles)

**Safety Rating**: ★★★★★ (5/5)

## Account Types

### Raw Spread Account:
- **Minimum deposit**: $200
- **Spreads**: From 0.0 pips
- **Commission**: $3.50 per lot
- **Best for**: Scalpers, EA traders

### Standard Account:
- **Minimum deposit**: $200
- **Spreads**: From 0.6 pips
- **Commission**: None

## Spreads Comparison

| Instrument | Raw Spread | Standard | Industry Avg |
|------------|------------|----------|--------------|
| EURUSD | 0.0 + $3.50 | 0.6 pips | 0.8 pips |
| GBPUSD | 0.0 + $3.50 | 0.7 pips | 1.0 pips |
| XAUUSD | 0.15 | 0.25 | 0.30 |
| USDJPY | 0.0 + $3.50 | 0.5 pips | 0.7 pips |

## Why ECN Matters for Scalpers

**ECN (Electronic Communication Network)** offers:
- Direct market access
- No dealing desk
- True market spreads
- No requotes
- Fast execution

## Deposits and Withdrawals

### Methods Available:
- **Bank Transfer**: 1-2 days
- **Card**: Instant deposit, 2-3 days withdrawal
- **USDT**: Instant
- **Skrill/Neteller**: Instant

### M-Pesa:
**Not supported** - This is the main drawback for Kenyan traders.

**Workaround**: Use Skrill/Neteller to fund, then withdraw to bank.

## MT5 Platform

ICMarkets offers superior MT5 experience:
- ✓ True ECN execution
- ✓ No restrictions on EAs
- ✓ Lowest latency
- ✓ VPS hosting available

## PesaPips Compatibility

ICMarkets is **excellent** for PesaPips automation:

- ✓ No EA restrictions
- ✓ Stable connection

- **Phone**: International
- **No Kenya office**: Support from overseas

**Support Rating**: ★★★★☆ (4.5/5)

## Pros and Cons

### Pros:
✓ Lowest spreads in the industry (0.0 pips)

✓ No restrictions on EAs
✓ VPS hosting available
✓ Islamic accounts

- Scalpers who need lowest spreads
- EA traders (PesaPips users)
- Experienced traders with $200+
- Traders with bank/card accounts

**Not for**:
- Beginners with small accounts
- Traders who need M-Pesa

## Real User Reviews

> "I switched to ICMarkets for scalping with PesaPips. The spreads on Raw account are incredible - 0.0 pips on EURUSD. Execution is instant. Worth the $200 deposit." - Brian O., Nairobi

> "No M-Pesa is annoying, but I use Skrill to fund. The trading conditions make up for it. Best broker for automated trading." - Peter K., Mombasa

title: How to Open a Forex Trading Account in Kenya: Step-by-Step
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to opening a forex trading account in Kenya. Choose a broker, verify identity, deposit via M-Pesa, and connect to PesaPips.
content:
## Your Journey to Forex Trading Starts Here

Opening a forex account in Kenya is simple. Follow this guide to start trading in less than 24 hours.

## Step 1: Choose Your Broker

Based on our reviews, here are the best options:

### Recommended Broker: HFM (HF Markets)
- M-Pesa deposits
- Local office in Nairobi
- $5 minimum deposit
- FSCA regulated

**[Open HFM account →](https://register.hfm.com/ke/en/new-live-account/?refid=30359412)**

### Alternative: Exness
- $1 minimum deposit
- Instant M-Pesa withdrawals
- Good for small accounts

## Step 2: Complete Registration

### What You'll Need:
1. **Email address** - For account confirmation
2. **Phone number** - For M-Pesa verification
3. **National ID/Passport** - For identity verification

### Registration Process:
1. Click "Open Account" on broker website
2. Fill personal details (name, email, phone)
3. Choose account type (recommend: HFM Premium)
4. Set leverage (recommend: 1:200 for Kenya)
5. Accept terms and conditions

## Step 3: Verify Your Identity

Brokers require proof of:

### Identity Verification:
- Upload National ID or Passport
- Clear photo of both sides
- Must match registration name

### Address Verification:
- Utility bill (KPLC, water)
- Bank statement
- Less than 3 months old

**Processing time**: 1-24 hours

## Step 4: Deposit Funds

### M-Pesa Deposit (HFM):
1. Log into HFM portal
2. Click "Deposit"
3. Select "M-Pesa"
4. Enter amount (minimum KSh 1,000)
5. Confirm with M-Pesa PIN
6. Funds appear instantly

### Other Deposit Methods:
- **Bank transfer**: 1-2 days
- **Card**: Instant
- **Skrill/Neteller**: Instant

## Step 5: Download MetaTrader 5

### From Your Broker:
1. Log into broker portal
2. Find "Platforms" section
3. Download MT5 for:
   - Windows/Mac (desktop)
   - iOS/Android (mobile)

### Login to MT5:
1. Open MT5
2. Click "File" → "Login to Trade Account"
3. Enter:
   - Account number (from broker)
   - Password (you created)
   - Server (choose from list)

## Step 6: Connect to PesaPips

Now that your MT5 account is ready:

1. **Sign up for PesaPips**
   - Go to [pesapips.ai/register](https://pesapips.ai/register)
   - Create free account

2. **Connect MT5**
   - Go to Dashboard → MT5 Connect
   - Enter your MT5 credentials
   - Test connection

3. **Choose a Strategy**
   - EMA Crossover
   - Support/Resistance
   - Scalping strategy
   - Or build your own

4. **Start Automating**
   - Set risk parameters
   - Enable Autorun
   - Let PesaPips trade for you

**[Connect to PesaPips now →](https://pesapips.ai/register)**

## Account Types Explained

### Demo Account:
- Virtual money
- Practice trading
- Test strategies
- No risk

**Recommendation**: Use for 2-4 weeks before live

### Live Account:
- Real money
- Real profits/losses
- Psychological pressure
- Real trading experience

## Minimum Deposit Recommendations

| Experience | Recommended Deposit |
|------------|---------------------|
| Beginner | $50-$100 |
| Intermediate | $200-$500 |
| Advanced | $1,000+ |

## Common Questions

### How long does verification take?
Typically 1-24 hours. Can be instant if documents are clear.

### Can I withdraw my deposit?
Yes, always. Withdraw to same method used for deposit.

### Is my money safe?
With regulated brokers (HFM, ICMarkets), client funds are held in segregated accounts.

### Do I need to pay tax on forex profits?
Consult a tax professional. Forex trading is taxable in Kenya.

## Next Steps After Opening Account

### Week 1-2: Demo Trading
- Learn MT5 platform
- Practice entry/exit
- Test strategies

### Week 3-4: Live with Small Size
- Start with 0.01 lots
- Risk 0.5% per trade
- Journal all trades

### Month 2+: Scale Up
- Add PesaPips automation
- Increase lot size gradually
- Add more strategies

## Start Your Trading Journey

Ready to begin?

**[Open HFM account with M-Pesa →](https://register.hfm.com/ke/en/new-live-account/?refid=30359412)**

**[Then connect to PesaPips →](https://pesapips.ai/register)**

*Trading involves risk. Start small, learn first, scale later.*
